issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Define a users/posts schema with relations and generate a migration
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses drizzle-orm/pg-core builders (pgTable, uuid, varchar, timestamp), declares relations() for posts↔users, and runs npx drizzle-kit generate to emit the migration; baseline writes a typeORM/Prisma-style schema or hand-rolled SQL without drizzle-kit generate.

scenarios.name: Fetch admins with their published posts using nested includes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses db.query.users.findMany with the with: { posts: ... } relational include filtered by eq(users.role, 'admin'); baseline writes two manual queries or a hand-built JOIN with no awareness of db.query relational API.
